form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 13 at this track over 295m. Last start was fifth over 295m in 17.19, behind Opawa Archie. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after her success on March 13 at this track over 295m. Last start was fifth over 295m in 17.19, behind Opawa Archie. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened in back straight, faltered and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 295m at this track by one length in a Class 1. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 295m at this track by one length in a Class 1. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at Ascot Park, beaten 7 lengths (23.24) behind Bernie Lou in a Class 2 on April 15. Look for improvement. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at Ascot Park, beaten 7 lengths (23.24) behind Bernie Lou in a Class 2 on April 15. Look for improvement. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground and forced into turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 15 over 390m at Ascot Park behind Bernie Lou beaten 10 lengths (23.41) in a Class 2. Has clocked a fast 17.2 Best Time here at the trip. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on April 15 over 390m at Ascot Park behind Bernie Lou beaten 10 lengths (23.41) in a Class 2. Has clocked a fast 17.2 Best Time here at the trip. Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost ground entering bend, heel off heels into home straight.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 2.75 lengths behind Claws In Krypton over 295m. Others read better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 2.75 lengths behind Claws In Krypton over 295m. Others read better.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (17.24) over 295m at this track. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (22.90) over 390m at Ascot Park. Jumps from a wide draw. Place claims.

formComments.comment: Finished second last start (22.90) over 390m at Ascot Park. Jumps from a wide draw. Place claims.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Class 2 on March 30 over 295m at this track behind Opawa Izzy beaten 6 lengths (17.58). Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 295m at this track. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.
